programDescription: Generate daily/weekly/monthly work reports from Git commits and diffs using AI
cmdCommitDescription: Generate a commit message from diff with AI, confirm, then commit (requires staged changes when committing)
optStaged: Use staged diff only (default auto: staged if any, else working tree — generate only, no commit)
optWork: Use unstaged diff only (generate message only, never run git commit)
optNoCommit: Print message only, do not commit
askGitAddFirst: Unstaged changes detected. Run git add -A first? [Y/N]
msgNoDiffAfterStage: No diff after staging. Please check.
askCommitWithStaged: Commit staged changes with the message above? [Y/N]
errNoStagedButUnstaged:
No staged changes, but unstaged changes were detected.
Please git add what you need, then run {cliName} commit --staged,
or omit --staged to generate from working tree only (no auto-commit).
errNoAnalyzableDiff: No diff to analyze (working tree and staging area are clean).
loadingCommitFromStaged: Calling AI for commit message from staged diff, please wait
loadingCommitFromUnstaged: Calling AI for commit message from unstaged diff, may take a few seconds
loadingCommitFromDiff: Calling AI for commit message from diff, may take a few seconds
msgUnstagedDiffNoCommit: Diff is from unstaged changes; no commit was made. Git add first, then run {cliName} commit
descPostActionCopyReport: Pass copy to also write the same output to the system clipboard
descPostActionCopyCommit: Pass copy to also write the message to the system clipboard after display
errUnknownPostAction: Unknown argument "{postAction}"; to copy after generation use: {cliName} {commandName} copy
cmdCopyDescription: Copy to clipboard: pipe input, --text, or the last cached report / commit message body
optCopyText: Copy this string directly (no pipe needed)
errNoCacheContent:
Nothing cached to copy. Run {cliName} day / week / month / commit on this machine first, or use:
  {cliName} day | {cliName} copy
  {cliName} copy --text "some text"
errStdinEmptyNoCache:
Stdin is empty and there is no cache. Use:
  {cliName} day | {cliName} copy
  {cliName} copy --text "some text"
cmdDayDescription: Generate a daily report for today or a given date
optDingtalkAssist: After generation, assist sending to DingTalk: copy body and launch desktop app
optLangHelp: Report body language (omit to match terminal UI language; e.g. zh, en)
loadingReportGenerating: Calling AI with commits and diffs to build the report, may take a few seconds
fallbackNoCommits: (no commits in range; cannot generate summary)
fallbackNoCommitsDefault: (no commits in range; cannot generate summary)
fallbackReportHeader: Today's work (commit titles only, AI not called):
fallbackReportHeaderDefault: Today's work (commit titles only, AI not called):
errNeedApiKey: Set OPEN_AI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and try again
errBothKeysNeedProvider: Both OPEN_AI_API_KEY and DEEPSEEK_API_KEY are set but AI_PROVIDER is not. Set AI_PROVIDER=openai or AI_PROVIDER=deepseek
errSetDeepseekKey: Set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (or OPEN_AI_API_KEY as a compatible key) and try again
errAiEmptyResponse: AI returned empty content; check API and model
errNoClipboardTool: No clipboard tool found; install wl-copy, xclip, or xsel
errClipboardUnsupportedPlatform: Clipboard copy is not supported on {platform}
cmdDingtalkDescription: Generate report, use DingTalk desktop app only, then guide Workbench -> Daily -> report editor for paste and submit
optDingtalkWeb: Use browser auto-fill mode (default is DingTalk desktop app mode)
optDingtalkUrl: Custom DingTalk report page URL (overrides default entry and WORKPILOT_DINGTALK_REPORT_URL)
optDingtalkReuse: Do not regenerate; use the last cached day/week/month body
optDingtalkSelector: CSS selector for the "Completed work" field (overrides WORKPILOT_DINGTALK_COMPLETED_SELECTOR)
optDingtalkLoginWaitMs: Max wait for an editable field to appear (ms)
errDingtalkMissingUrl: No usable DingTalk report URL resolved; pass --url.
errDingtalkMissingCacheForReuse: No cached report to reuse. Run {cliName} day first, or run dingtalk without --reuse.
msgDingtalkBrowserCheck:
Filled "Completed work" in the browser. Review and submit the report in the page.
When done, return here and press Enter to close the browser.
msgDingtalkPressEnterWhenDone: Press Enter to close the browser…
msgDingtalkFillFailed: DingTalk fill failed ({reason}{detail}). Full text printed below; clipboard copy attempted.
msgDingtalkAppLaunchOk: DingTalk desktop app opened and report editor deeplink attempted ({copied}).
msgDingtalkAppManualGuide: In DingTalk App follow: Workbench -> Daily -> report editor ({copiedHint}). Paste into "Completed work" and submit. If Daily is missing, switch to an organization where Daily is enabled.
msgDingtalkAppOpenFailed: Failed to open DingTalk desktop app: {msg}
msgDingtalkNotCopiedShort: copy failed; copy manually from terminal output
msgDingtalkCopiedHint: report text is already in your clipboard
msgDingtalkNotCopiedHint: clipboard copy failed; copy from terminal output first
